It's red, white, and blue"... berries! Taste the fireworks in her summer berry clafouti, a cross between cake and custard that is somehow better than both! From purple mountains to amber waves"... this a is a menu celebrate!

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Raspberries, Mint, Peas and Apricot
programme.desc: Zestful cook Amanda Herrera scoops up raspberries, peas, mint, and apricots to use in three summer recipes.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Honey, Cherries, Garlic Scapes and Carrots
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms market fresh honey, cherries, garlic scapes and carrots into two simple chic sides and an irresistible dessert.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Sprouts, Veggies and Potatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera creates two summer fresh salads and a hearty breakfast using sprouts, potatoes and leafy lambs quarters.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Ultimate Tournament
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill team grill up a feast for some hungry athletes at the Ultimate Frisbee Tournament. Jumbo shrimp with a rosemary dry rub, Slo-smoked Pork Butt in a Papaya Marinade, and Asian Pasta Salad have the athletes asking for more.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Steam Train
programme.desc: The Antique Steam train is in town! Matt and the team give the crowd something to chew-chew on with delicious Grilled Vegetable Quesadillas, Honey Mustard Chicken Drumsticks, Grilled Turkey Burgers with Pineapple Salsa, and Grilled Corn with Orange Butter

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Baseball Game
programme.desc: The Road Grill team follows him to the baseball diamond and together they treat the ball players to two kinds of mini burgers, some triple play stuffed veal, Mushroom Fricassee on a baguette, and Homerun Mixed Smoked Nuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Habitat Build
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill team lend a hand at a Habitat for Humanity building site to feed hungry volunteers. Matt and the team make some delicious Brick Chicken, some Maple Wood Planked Pork, Steak Sandwiches, and Blue Cheese and Bacon Potato Salad.

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Smoky Bacon & Sweet Mornin’ Treats
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke bacon from scratch, whip up a melon ball salad, and share the secrets of French toast on the grill!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Ribs, Wings & Island Things
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke some craveable ribs, whip up a hearty salad, and grill Jamaican jerk wings!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Smoked Seafood & Sister Sass
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke salmon to turn it into pastrami, whip up a colorful Caribbean salad, and grill savory rosemary-seasoned pork chops!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Jerk Jokes & Smokin’ Lamb
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a gorgeous lamb shoulder, whip up a simple grated salad, and grill up Jamaican jerk mushrooms!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Pork was Made for Barbeques
programme.desc: Pork and the grill are good buddies and host Spencer Watts shows us four of his favourite pork recipes that will have you salivating.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Fruit on the ‘Q
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic; Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple Smoked Pork Tenderloin is bathed in a fog of applewood smoke and he then tops it with tart apple-blueberry compote. Cinnamon buns are amazing with a bit of orange peel - but have you ever had them in an orange peel and on the grill? That's right and Spencer shows you how you can make fun and flavourful Orange Peel Cinnamon Buns on the barbecue using indirect heat.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Allium in the Family
programme.desc: Onions, green onions, chives, garlic, and leeks are all members of the same fabulous flowering family, Allium! First up? Chef Watts shows us his sweet and smoky Charred Leeks with Romesco; add grilled toast and you have your next party appetizer! Next up is a main course. Spencer starts with a juicy grilled pork chop, then adds roasted garlic melted into a balsamic onion chutney to make his out-of-this-world Roasted Garlic Pork Chops. Looking for a crowd pleaser that's easy to make? Spencer has a recipe for that! Chicken Yakitori. He threads skewers with crunchy green onions and tender chicken and caramelizes the yakitori sauce as he grills this tasty dish. Are you ready to drool? Spencer shows us how to make Allium your main dish with Stuffed Vidalia Onions. Loaded with savoury bacon, salty blue cheese and garlic, you'll want to eat this dish for every meal!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Cheesy BBQ
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy Mascarpone and perfectly balances sweet, smoky, and salty flavours.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Kohlrabi, Fennel, Kale and Red Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera shows us why fresh is always best with two creative dishes using ingredients from the farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Raspberries, Mint, Peas and Apricot
programme.desc: Zestful cook Amanda Herrera scoops up raspberries, peas, mint, and apricots to use in three summer recipes.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Collard Greens, Maple Syrup, Goat Cheddar and Heirloom Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera prepares a frittata, rosemary skewer chicken and grilled bread salad with fresh ingredients from a local farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Broccoli, Rainbow Chard and Herbs
programme.desc: Warm host Amanda Herrera picks up colourful produce and herbs at a farmers' market to make a delicious appetizer and tasty cold oil French fries.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Frosh Day
programme.desc: Welcome to BBQing 101. The team gives the school term a kick start for some rowdy university students. Smoked Pulled Pork with Tangy BBQ Sauce, Spiced up Beer Can Chicken and Chili Yam Fries give these scholars a taste of simple, healthy BBQed food.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Wake and Skate
programme.desc: Matt and the team do some extreme grilling for the skateboarders at a local park. The crowd flips for Black Bean Mussels, Prosciutto Wrapped Chicken Breasts Stuffed with Goat Cheese, Smoked Tomato Bruschetta and Smoked Banana Sticks with Rum Butter Glaze.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Tennis Day
programme.desc: Matt and his team visit the tennis club and serve up some grilled eats for the club members. Smoked Salmon, Beef Tenderloin with Cherry Sauce, Asparagus with Citrus Butter with a Grand Slam Beet Salad are the perfect match after a long day on the courts

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Farmer's Market
programme.desc: Matt and the Team prepare BBQ Sunday Dinner with ingredients from the Farmers Market. Herbed Prime Rib, Grilled Pork Chops with Garlic and Herbs, Roasted Root Veggies with Mustard Glaze, and Yorkshire pudding will please friends and family alike!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Surf, Turf & a Whole Lotta Cheese
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke some beautiful scallops, whip up a cheesy, meaty asparagus side, and grill up some delicious buffalo burgers!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Southern Smoke & Sizzlin' Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a beef brisket, whip up some delicious Texas sides, and show you how to smoke a daikon!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Meatloaf, Venison & Country Comforts
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they show you how to smoke a meatloaf, make a potato salad that will have everyone asking for the recipe, and grill up savory venison chops!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Cluck, Chops & Summer Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a whole chicken, whip up summery corn and watermelon sides, and share the wonder that is onion water lamb chops!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Achin' for Bacon
programme.desc: In this bacon loving episode, Chef Spencer delivers a tasty Bacon Weave Turkey Breast, which gets injected with beer and spices before being wrapped up in its cozy bacon blanket and sent off to the grill! Next up? A Peameal Bacon Roast with Rosti. This heavy hunk of back bacon gets smoked to flavourful perfection while Chef Watts makes the crispiest golden-fried-to-perfection potato pancake. Then, Spencer whips up a charry, grilled, super decadent, bacon-wrapped and bacon stuffed cheeseburger. Spencer isn't finished with bacon yet! For his final recipe, Spencer stuffs an apple with decadent crispy morsels stuffed along with savoury caramelized onions and melty cheddar cheese.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Grilled Veggies
programme.desc: This episode kicks off with Spencer's tasty Grilled Caesar Salad. He skillfully piles of char-grilled romaine lettuce wedges and sourdough croutons are topped with tangy dressing, crispy pancetta, and shards of a homemade parmesan tuile. For his next recipe, Spencer whips up Grilled Zucchini Boats that filled with fresh ingredients including orzo pasta, summer veggies, and herbs. Chef Watts loves a good steak and his Grilled Cauliflower Steak is not one to be passed up! Dusted in Middle Eastern Spices, flame roasted and served with chili-spiked, Yemeni 'Skhug' hot sauce and pomegranate seeds. Finally, Spencer steams tender artichokes, stuffing these flowers with breadcrumbs and stretchy-melty cheese, and finishes this delicious dish on the grill.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Handheld Party Foods
programme.desc: The most liked post on any grill-master's social feed is 'meat on a stick' - and Chef Spencer's Turkish-style chicken kabob is worth every click! He marinates thick juicy chicken morsels in yogurt and spices, and then grills these flavourful skewers to a charry perfection. Next up is the creative 'Tornado Potato' which re- invents grilled potatoes with a wild presentation and a trio of toppings. Spencer then assembles Char Siu Sliders on tiny party- ready buns. Stuffed with a soy, honey and umami-packed hoisin lacquered slow-and-low grilled pork belly, these tasty little sliders will have your taste buds tingling. For his final recipe, Spencer whips up toasted crispy roti cups; topping them with plump and majestic grilled prawns and stuffed with a layered spicy chickpea curry. Now that's a BBQ party!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Fire & Spice
programme.desc: Chef Spencer starts this spicy barbeque episode with flavours from Thailand with a Bok Choy with a Ginger Chili Sauce. Powerful bird's eye chilies are packed into a sweet and spicy sauce and served over tasty grilled bok choy. Spencer then introduces us to Calabrian chilies, mashed into a spice paste and rubbed on butterflied chicken that then gets grilled to flame-kissed perfection. Next, Spencer gives fresh calamari some heat with Korean chilies that add their distinctive heat and flavour before grilling this scrumptious recipe and serving it over a comforting bed of rice and peas. Finally, Spencer prepares Seekh Kabobs, made with ground lamb spiked with punchy dried Kashmiri chilies and a blend of fresh hot peppers.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Honeycomb, Shallots and Iceberg Lettuce
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms fresh market ingredients into two irresistible dishes, including a one pot Lamb Curry with Honeycomb.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Patty Pan Summer Squash and Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Beans, Raspberry Jam and Relish
programme.desc: On today's Fresh Market Dinners menu, host Amanda Herrera prepares succulent burgers with golden fries and a refreshing cocktail.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Cream, Sunflower Oil and Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Using cream, sunflower oil and cherry tomatoes from the market, host Amanda Herrera makes an irresistible pasta recipe and indulgent dessert.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Ethnic Market
programme.desc: Using internationally inspired recipes, Matt and the Road Grill team take us on a taste bud tour around the world with Stuffed Peppers, Bison Burgers with Oka Cheese, Tandoori Lamb Ribs and Tea Smoked Hoisin Duck.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 The Coed Charity Baseball Tournament
programme.desc: Matt and the Team cook up a mound of food for hungry athletes raising money for charity. No one went hungry with Beef Dip Sandwiches; Lemon Honey Garlic Baby Back Pork Ribs; and fresh Grilled Mahi-mahi with sweet Pineapple Tomatillo Salsa.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Mother's Day Celebration
programme.desc: Everyone should treat Mom to a special breakfast! Matt and his team treated a crowd on Mother's Day to a BBQed Brunch. They feasted on Stuffed Blueberry Mascarpone French Toast, a Veggie Frittata, Applewood Smoked Canadian Bacon, and Fresh Fruit Smoothies

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Buskers
programme.desc: The Buskers Festival is in town! The team hit the grill to do some BBQ entertaining. They cook up a feast for the crowd including a Roast of Pork with Concord Grape Sauce, Spicy Shrimp, and Beer Braised Sausage with Caramelized Onions

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Grilled Dough & Duck Low and Slow
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke juicy duck breasts, whip up a Caesar salad, and share the secrets of pizza on the grill!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Hooked on Smoke & Sandwich Love
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, smoke tilapia, whip up veggie quesadillas, and grill a chicken sandwich like you’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Smoky Bacon & Sweet Mornin’ Treats
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke bacon from scratch, whip up a melon ball salad, and share the secrets of French toast on the grill!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Ribs, Wings & Island Things
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke some craveable ribs, whip up a hearty salad, and grill Jamaican jerk wings!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Spanish Flare
programme.desc: First stop on Chef Spencer's Spanish flavour tour? Habanero Char-Grilled Octopus - warmed up with punchy chilies and balanced with a sweet and tangy sherry vinaigrette. Next, Spencer stuffs whole sea bass with citrus and herbs, gives it the grill treatment and then tops it with olive oil blistered cherry tomatoes. The rotisserie does the heavy lifting for Mr. Watts' whole roast chicken - spiked with bright Spanish flavours like Spanish chilies and smoked paprika, slow cooked and served extra juicy. Finally, Spencer prepares a classic Spanish recipe: Paella. Loaded saffron rice, piled high with chorizo, veggies, and shellfish. Of course, Spencer's Paella is made in the Spanish tradition; outside, over the fire, on a beautiful sunny day!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The Butter Did It
programme.desc: It's all about beautiful butter in this episode of Watts on the Grill! First up, entertaining host Spencer fires tosses clams in velvety butter, zesty garlic and earthy spices to make his Clams with Garlic Paprika Butter. Next up is a traditional Indian recipe, but done on the grill - Butter Chicken! All the butter chicken flavours we love are infused in the marinade, before getting crisped up on the fiery grill - the result is both classic and completely new! Scallops are next, grilled and served with a mouth-watering caper-raisin butter. For his final recipe; Chef Watts prepares a rich and juicy grilled Rib Steak topped with a decadent port wine compound butter. Oh, what a butter-loving day!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Salt Rocks!
programme.desc: We've all cooked with salt. But what about ON salt. That's right, chef Spencer Watts blows our minds with his seared scallops that are cooked on a Himalayan pink salt block. His next recipe uses a quick cure with Hawaiian black lava salt on swordfish steaks, then tops them with a gorgeous and refreshing grilled fruit salsa. Then, Spencer gets creative with Cured Duck Legs with Scallions, using a salt cure to intensify the flavours of duck leg before it's cooked slow and low, then glazed with maple and soy. After cooking on salt, curing with salt, the only thing left is to cook INSIDE salt - Spencer's Salt Crusted Prime Rib is a game changer, flavourful, bone-in beef that he seasons with a big, bold Dijon mustard, rosemary and horseradish rub before encasing it completely in a classic salt crust and sending it to the grill.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Cocoa-Q
programme.desc: Chocolate on the barbecue? That's right. Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode as he grills a crispy coconut-cacao crust and serves it with sweet chili dipping sauce. Chocolate is the not-so-secret ingredient in Spencer's Grilled Chicken Molé. He grills the chicken legs smothered in the sweet-spicy-salty-nutty-creamy-chocolatey sauce, then finishes it by cooking it slow and low. Next, dark chocolate cocoa powder is in both the rub and the sauce for Chef Watts' favourite pork rib recipe - Cocoa-rubbed Baby Back Ribs. For his final recipe, Spencer takes it to a sweet level with his Chocolate pizza made with chocolate ganache, grilled cherries, with barbeque- caramelized white chocolate crumble over the top.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Honey, Cherries, Garlic Scapes and Carrots
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms market fresh honey, cherries, garlic scapes and carrots into two simple chic sides and an irresistible dessert.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Sprouts, Veggies and Potatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera creates two summer fresh salads and a hearty breakfast using sprouts, potatoes and leafy lambs quarters.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Kohlrabi, Fennel, Kale and Red Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera shows us why fresh is always best with two creative dishes using ingredients from the farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Raspberries, Mint, Peas and Apricot
programme.desc: Zestful cook Amanda Herrera scoops up raspberries, peas, mint, and apricots to use in three summer recipes.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 The Garage Sale
programme.desc: The Road Grill Team go to a neighbourhood Garage Sale, then treat everyone to everyday dishes with a twist. Matt and his team grill up some Grilled Porterhouse Steaks in a Homemade Steak Spice; Grilled Lemon Prosciutto Scallops; Planked Stuffed Potatoes and a Grilled Caesar Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 The Dog Show
programme.desc: Matt loves animals - including dogs. He goes to a Dog Show to give dog lovers a little taste of what the QB is cooking - Garlicky Grilled Artichokes; Bacon Wrapped Halibut With Lime Scallion Sauce Sauce; Slow Cooked Spareribs With Guava Glaze; and A Summer Wild Berry Crisp.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Cycle Day
programme.desc: Matt and the Team grill up some chow at a bike ride Fundraiser. They tempt the crowd with Hazelnut Crusted Halibut with Strawberry Salsa, Pork Picnic Roast with Blackberry Chipotle Glaze, Grilled Paninis with Roast Veggies, and Spinach Salad with Apples, Bacon and Cashews

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Fitness Day
programme.desc: Matt and his team hit fitness central and cook up a grilled feast that is high on protein and lean on fat including Salt Crusted Peel and Eat Shrimp; Lime Chipotle Pork Medallions; Mesquite Smoked Turkey with Peach Glaze and a Sweet and Spicy Black Bean Salad.

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Smoked Seafood & Sister Sass
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke salmon to turn it into pastrami, whip up a colorful Caribbean salad, and grill savory rosemary-seasoned pork chops!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Jerk Jokes & Smokin’ Lamb
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a gorgeous lamb shoulder, whip up a simple grated salad, and grill up Jamaican jerk mushrooms!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Surf, Turf & a Whole Lotta Cheese
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke some beautiful scallops, whip up a cheesy, meaty asparagus side, and grill up some delicious buffalo burgers!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Southern Smoke & Sizzlin' Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a beef brisket, whip up some delicious Texas sides, and show you how to smoke a daikon!

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Four Flavours, Four Dishes…One Multi-Cooker!
programme.desc: Using just one pot, host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks four delicious dishes including Peachy Pulled Pork Tacos and a Lime and Basil Pie.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Hearty Weeknight Multi-Cooker Dishes
programme.desc: Do you know the secret to an uncracked cheesecake? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco shares her trick to making a perfectly silky-smooth Salted Caramel Cheesecake.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Classic Sunday Dishes Made in Weeknight Time
programme.desc: Charming cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four multi-cooker dishes that save on time but are bursting with flavour.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Four Fresh Dinners that are Always on Time
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up four dinners in minutes using her multi-cooker including a delicious Lasagna and mouth-watering Burrito Bowl with Chermoula.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Fall
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern loves the flavours of fall so she bakes up some delicious treats using warm, autumn inspired ingredients.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Winter
programme.desc: What should you do in a wild winter blizzard? Bake! Host Jessica McGovern makes sweet winter treats like an extravagant Gingerbread Chalet.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Paris
programme.desc: Charismatic host Jessica McGovern whips up classic desserts from the beautiful city of Paris.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Country Fair
programme.desc: Country fair treats made right at home! Host Jessica McGovern makes tasty fair-inspired desserts like classic Funnel Cake.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E19 Rice and Rosemary
programme.desc: In this "R" challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas shows us how to use rice and rosemary in delicious meals.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Lamb and Licorice
programme.desc: After picking the letter "L," Chef Robert Jewell takes on lamb and licorice in this ingredient challenge. He starts with aromatic Moroccan lamb riblets, an appetizer that will make you want this spicy dish as your main course too. Next, Robert takes it up a notch by showing us how to make licorice - yes, the candy! He brings coconut oil, brown sugar, creamed coconut, and molasses to boil before skillfully adding flour and anise to make sweet, chewy coconut licorice. Finally, Robert concocts the perfect recipe that combines succulent lamb with sweet licorice.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Radicchio and Raisins
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin creates savoury meals in this letter "R" challenge featuring radicchios and raisins. First, Theresa chops up bold and bitter radicchios, grilling them until the edges are a crispy golden brown and perfect for a warm wedge salad. Then, she tosses fried pancetta and earthy portobello mushrooms in a luxurious champagne vinegar and pours it over the crispy radicchio. Theresa tops this warm salad with creamy crumbled goat's cheese. For her next dish, Theresa prepares a rum raisin sauce using golden sultana raisins, dark rum, and fresh orange. Theresa pours the sauce over succulent ham. Is your mouth watering yet? Finally, Theresa combines radicchio and raisin into a colourful and delicious side dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E20 Pork and Peanuts
programme.desc: It's all about pork and peanuts, today's challenge is the letter "P." Chef Lauren Gulyas serves up an old school favourite, smothered pork chops. Using a blend of savoury ingredients, and with the help of her cast iron pan, Chef Lauren provides us with tips on how to keep your pork tender and tasty. Next, it's time for a West African peanut soup. Drizzling garlic, ginger and onions with extra virgin olive oil and letting them sizzle in a frying pan until the onions are soft brings out a sweetness that lends itself beautifully to the salty, earthy taste of peanuts. To finish, Chef Lauren puts an Asian twist on a southern classic, when she combines the two ingredients.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Easy Weeknight Recipes for Busy Days
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks her way from Monday to Friday with four delicious dishes, including a Roast Beef feast and velvety Earl Grey Pudding.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fast and Flavourful Dinners for Monday to Thursday
programme.desc: Home cook Vanessa Gianfrancesco uses her multi-cooker to whip up four comforting weeknight meals that are fast and easy.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Weeknight Dishes made in Little Thyme
programme.desc: Who has "thyme" to make dinner after a hectic day? Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco inspires with four recipes including a Mushroom Thyme Risotto.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Sweet, Salty, and Surprising Multi-Cooker Recipes
programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Sweet & Salty Desserts
programme.desc: Which tasty treats tantalize your taste buds? Sweet and salty ones, of course! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourites.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Rainbow Galaxy Party
programme.desc: Nothing is more mesmerizing than outer space! Host Jessica McGovern bakes delicious desserts with a galaxy-inspired twist.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Italian Sweets
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern bakes up some delightful Italian classics including a crumbly Cherry-pistachio Biscotti.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fancy French Flavours
programme.desc: Talented baker Jessica McGovern shows us how to get fancy with three stunning French desserts.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Coconut and Crab
programme.desc: In this "C" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell cooks up recipes using coconut and crab before combining both into a single recipe. Using sweet coconut, Robert makes a classic dessert -- an irresistible coconut cream pie. He starts with a delectable crunchy graham cracker crust and tops his pie with fluffy whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes. Next, Robert transforms a fresh soft-shell crab into a delicious, spicy, and crunchy dish. The best part? It's fast and easy to make. After soaking the crab in milk, Robert dunks it into a flour-cornmeal mixture and fries it until golden brown. But that's not all, Robert whips up the perfect dipping sauce, using spicy smoked- jalapeno, lime, and orange adobo mayo. Finally, Robert brings coconut and crab into one delicious dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Sesame and Scallops
programme.desc: It's all about sesame and scallops in this letter "S" challenge, and host Theresa Visintin has some appetizing ideas up her sleeve. First, she shows us how to make scallop cassoulet, a simple recipe that can be cooked even faster than it can eaten! Theresa browns the tender scallops in delicious bacon fat and then bakes it on a bed of creamy kidney beans. Next, Theresa uses sesame seeds to create a zesty sauce for a take-out favourite, made in your very own kitchen - noodles! For her final recipe, our culinary host combines sesame and scallops, creating a juicy, crunchy masterpiece.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Water Chestnut and Watercress
programme.desc: Making dishes with the letter “W” could be seen as a real challenge, but Chef Lauren Gulyas has got it covered. Choosing water chestnut and watercress as her star ingredients, Chef Lauren begins by serving up an Asian inspired rice dish complete with crunchy water chestnuts. She starts off cooking rice in chicken broth, a great way to infuse the grain with a subtle savoury flavour. Sautéing celery, garlic, and onion in sesame oil adds a flavour kick. Throw in some ginger, veggies, and water chestnuts and enjoy the sound of the sizzle. Next up, Lauren puts a peppery twist on a classic recipe, linguine with watercress pesto. Then it’s time for the grand finale, Chef Lauren uses both ingredients to create the ultimate culinary combination.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Tea and Turkey
programme.desc: Tea and turkey are an unlikely combo for a meal, but Chef Robert Jewell is a creative force in the kitchen. First, he gives earl grey and lavender tea a sweet treatment by making a rich semifreddo. Robert creates a silky tea infused syrup, which he drizzles over a luxurious custard and tops with whipped cream. Robert punches up the colour by adding tart poached raspberries and vibrant violet lavender petals. Now, it's time for a real show stopper - saffron turkey kebabs with pomegranate rice. This is not your average turkey dinner. First, Robert marinates the turkey pieces in lime, yogourt and garlic. After infusing basmati rice with aromatic saffron and bay leaves, Robert tosses the rice with crunchy pine nuts and sweet pomegranate - the perfect bed for his grilled to- perfection turkey skewers. Robert then takes his culinary skills to the next level when he uses tea and turkey in one single delicious dish.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make hamburgers with sides and dessert for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: smash burgers, pickle slaw, matchstick fries, and strawberry chocolate milkshakes!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Beef-a-palooza
programme.desc: Grilling expert Spencer Watts hosts a tasty beef-a-palooza with four incredible beef cuts including smoked brisket and succulent beef tenderloin.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Southern Brunch
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco brings the heat to her brunch table with southern-style recipes including a Huevos Divorciados and Fried Chicken and Waffles.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Shrimp and Sausage
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Memory Lane
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania take a delicious trip down memory lane with a menu of meaningful dishes and a table to match! There’s Tuscan beans, gnocchi with a duo of sauces, short rib braciole, chocolate semifreddo, and so much more!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Southern Barbeque Night

programme.title: MORE One Big Recipe

programme.title: MORE One Big Recipe
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Hearty Favorites
programme.desc: Re-join Chef Kimberly Lallouz in her One Big Recipe test kitchen as she masterfully creates a week night feast of Swiss chard and pea salad with green apple vinaigrette, broccoli and cheddar soup, salt crusted lamb loin with lamb gravy, and a green apple panna cotta with crispy cheddar frico.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners

programme.title: Sin Miedo a Nada
programme.desc: Estás invitado a vivir sin fronteras, derribar obstáculos y experimentar el poder transformador, sanador y guía de la Palabra.

programme.title: A Todo Gol
programme.desc: A Todo Gol une fútbol, fe y liderazgo. En el Mundial, invitados comparten análisis y reflexiones sobre valores de Dios fe y Cristo.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: IT manager Christine has bought herself a red brick terraced house in Clontarf, North Dublin. Christine has big plans for the place but as Dermot quickly discovers, they're far bigger than her 130K budget will allow. And despite his best efforts, Dermot is unable to convince Christine to modify her 25 page wish list.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the seaside village of Portrane in North Dublin, Dermot creates a workable home for three generations of the one family under the watchful, budget-conscious eyes of two sisters.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Recently returned to Ireland after 12 years in London, new parents website designer Cliona and IT manager Micheal have already spent 30 grand renovating a 1950s semi-D at Killester in North Dublin in their own distinctive, industrial style.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dairy farmer Padraig and schoolteacher Katie are hoping to create their 'forever' home by renovating a century-old farmhouse on a half acre of land recently inherited from Padraig's uncle. But delivering this dream won't be easy for their architect. Dermot's problems begin when he presents his initial design and it Katie announces that she has no time for 'open plan' living.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At a 1960s 'Semi D' in Stillorgan, Dermot's vision of a million euro 'Malibu style' house for Rory and Lorna from the west of Ireland descends into an ongoing battle over the style and position of the front door.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: David and Nessa Conlon have just bought this 1990s split level detached bungalow and plan to move in with their three children (twin boys aged 11 and a 7 year old girl) once the renovations have been completed.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the second episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Borrisoleigh, Co. Tipperary, to meet Joe Kenny and his bride to be Mary Hayes. Joe's house is a 3 bedroom, 2 storey house on a half acre site about half a mile from Borrisoleigh, with beautiful views of green fields. Mary and Joe are creating their dream home, to move into just after their wedding. Joe has lived the bachelor life up until now and his house reflects this. Dermot can see exactly why Mary is insisting on a redesign.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the third episode of Room To Improve, Dermot Bannon heads to Rathfarnham, where Yvonne and Adrian Saunders live with their daughter Lauren. Yvonne and Adrian's house is a detached 1950s two-bedroom property, in need of massive transformation. Dermot likens it to a 'Hansel and Gretel' house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In Ashford Co. Wicklow stands the house of Nigel and Frances Coffey. Frances's parents live next door. Several years ago her father built a private road and gave seven plots of land to his seven children.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Claudia and Tom bought this 1920s bungalow with panoramic views of Tramore Bay in 2012 for 305K. Just back from living abroad (Spain, Dubai and Germany) they have been living in the house for the past year.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S12 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Glenn Keating and Gustav van der Westhuizen live in Grace Park, Drumcondra, with their 5-year-old son Noah and two pet Weimaraner dogs. They live in an Edwardian terraced three story house. The terrace was originally built for officers of the British Army, between 1897 and 1902. Glenn is a youth worker for LGBTI+ young people in the city centre and Gustav is a banker.

programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite meets the descendants of the royal families of Hyderabad and Lucknow, and they tell her about the culture and cuisine of both kingdoms.

programme.title: Best From The Rest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 Best From The Rest Taiwan
programme.desc: From the Rainbow village to the Sun Moon Lake, Taiwan offers different experiences that exude the beauty and spirit of the country.

programme.title: Landmarks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Landmarks Trafalgar Square (ENG)
programme.desc: How does a simple town square transform into the timeless symbol of a city's soul? Watch the story of London’s iconic Trafalgar Square to find out.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Unwind Park Hyatt, Maldives
programme.desc: Indeya Passfield seeks local Maldivian experiences in Hadahaa, where she learns about the ecosystem, local traditions and cuisine.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Roy on the Maharaja's Express
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Mr. & Mrs. Roy on the Maharajas' Express Ep 2
programme.desc: On a trip aboard the Maharajas’ Express, Rohit and Manasi find themselves taking a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 World Heritage Norway's Heritage Sites
programme.desc: The abundant natural and man-made wonders of Norway tell stories of its long and rich history.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Viajar Peru Ica Nazca
programme.desc: Milagros’s first stop to showcase her country is at Ica on Peru’s southern coast known for its vineyards and for the desert oasis, Huacachina.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Quest Delhi 1, India
programme.desc: On a journey to find the lost and forgotten recipes of India, Alex finds herself at Asia’s biggest spice market.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 City Breaks Jaipur (ENG)
programme.desc: A quick escape to Jaipur introduces Asmita to the stark contrast in the old and new sides of Rajasthan’s capital city. On the one hand, she has a tryst with the global cosmopolis that attracts business and luxury travelers from all over the world. On the other hand, the regal monuments of the region reveal to her the stories of the kings who built them.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Belgium, Bruges 1
programme.desc: The food, the beers, the chocolate and the fries. Bruges is one of the cities that seemed to have skipped 21st century altogether.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Backpack, Dubrovnik Croatia
programme.desc: Alexandra, in this episode visits Dubrovnik, where she explores a war museum, the dramatic monuments, mesmerising landscapes and tries water sports.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Estonia Tallinn
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. Marco Biagioli and Erica Melargo, a famous Italian nomad couple, lose themselves in its fairy-tale charms, and find out its legends. They also visit iconic attractions such as Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and Raeapteek, the oldest pharmacy in Europe that has continuously been in business in the same building.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Viajar Peru Arequipa
programme.desc: In Arequipa, Milagros has set out to peel back the layers of her country’s history.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Quest Delhi 2
programme.desc: From a rich lamb curry to a hearty pulao made with rare mushrooms, Alex learns to make the secret recipes of a local family in Delhi.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 City Breaks Bundi, India
programme.desc: From stunning palaces to ornate stepwells, Asmita finds herself soaking in the romance of Bundi, a charming 14th century town in Rajasthan.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Belgium, Bruges 2
programme.desc: Market square of Bruges is lined up with restaurants and cafes. The city is also home to golden fries or french fries, but are originated in Belgium.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Backpack, Brac and Split Croatia
programme.desc: Stay tuned with Alex to find out what Barc, the coastal town of Croatia, has to offer a backpacker. She tries quad biking.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Estonia Aidu
programme.desc: Tallinn, Estonia’s capital, is known for its quaint, medieval Old Town but Italian nomad couple, Marco and Erica discover other sides to the city by visiting offbeat attractions such as the Seaplane Harbour Museum and Telliskivi Creative City, a hub of artists. They also tuck into a medieval feast at Olde Hansa Inn. Following this, they have an off-roading adventure at Aidu oil shale quarry.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Quest Delhi 3, India
programme.desc: From papad ka paratha to lehsun ki kheer, Chef Aditya Jaimini shows Alex Outhwaite how to make some of the unusual dishes from Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Belgium, Antwerp 1
programme.desc: Renowned as the world's leading city of diamonds, it also holds about possessing the second largest port in whole of Europe.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Backpack Split and Salona, Croatia
programme.desc: Explore the beautiful Dalmatian coast with a little history of Split with Alex and stay tuned as next she explores the port city of Salona.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Viajar Peru Titicaca
programme.desc: Amidst the sapphire expanse of Lake Titicaca, Milagros embarks on a journey of reconnecting with her roots. Delving into the secrets of the Uros, she unveils their timeless artistry in building floating islands, a testament to human resilience. But as she travels to Amantani Island, an enigma awaits—a forgotten temple, rituals that date back to the pre-Incan times, chapters of Peru’s lesser-explored history waiting to unfold.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 City Breaks Bikaner
programme.desc: Bikaner is known to most people as the city of world-famous savoury snacks. When Asmita goes there for a whirlwind trip, however, she discovers that there is a lot more to Rajasthan’s Red City than meets the eye. From the miniature paintings that can be found on the walls of palaces and mansions across the city to the elaborate architecture of the former havelis of merchants, she finds out that Bikaner is an art lover’s paradise.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Estonia Narva
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Quest Delhi 3, India
programme.desc: From papad ka paratha to lehsun ki kheer, Chef Aditya Jaimini shows Alex Outhwaite how to make some of the unusual dishes from Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Backpack Zadar, Croatia
programme.desc: Watch a musical instrument powered by sea waves and learn how glassware was made in Roman era. This and more with Alexandra in Zadar episode

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 10 Days Estonia Setomaa
programme.desc: Marco and Erica soak in the vitality of the student town, Tartu, and experience its eccentricities at the Leaning House and the AHHAA Science Centre. Following this, they visit Obinista, the cultural centre of Setomaa, where the Seto community introduces them to the traditional ways of dressing, singing and dancing. They also indulge in a traditional smoke sauna at nearby Võromaa.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Belgium, Antwerp 2
programme.desc: Antwerp has grown on the banks of the Scheldt River that alongwith the Meuse and the Rhine forms the biggest estuary in western Europe.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 World Spas Gaya Island Resort, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries a massage inspired by the waves of the sea and a chocolate vanilla body wrap at the Gaya Island Resort in Malaysia.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Quest Amritsar, India
programme.desc: Amritsar,where recipes have been passed down generations. Alex explores it in Quest.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Viajar Peru Cusco
programme.desc: Milagros visits the ancient city of Cusco just in time for the legendary Inti Raymi Festival, a gateway to the Inca empire's beliefs. Hidden in the vibrant festivities, which continue into the night, are glimpses into the lives led by the people during the Inca era.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Quest Hoshiyaarpur, India
programme.desc: You won't find anything more comforting than food made from scratch.Join Alex in Hoshiarpur as she finds old cuisines.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Xplore Belgium Ghent
programme.desc: No matter where you look, you will see impressive, interesting architecture that will catch your eye. Until 1550 Ghent was one of the largest cities.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Backpack, Plitvice Lopar and Zagreb Croatia
programme.desc: Alexandra in this episode explores Plitvice, where she visits a national park, interacts with locals, tastes local wine and then leaves for Zagreb.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Viajar Peru Inca Valley & Machu Picchu
programme.desc: Scaling rocks and defying heights, Milagros finds herself suspended 1200 feet above the ground at the Sacred Valley of the Incas.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 World Spas Fusion Maia, Vietnam
programme.desc: Travel to Da Nang this week with World Spas and take a peek into the life of the pampered few.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Estonia Sooma National Park
programme.desc: Embracing Estonia’s largest area of swamps, meadows and waterside forests, Soomaa National Park is the second largest national park in the country. While trying out bog walking and camping over here, Marco and Erica experience what is known as the “fifth season” in Estonia, the season of floods. They also explore Tallinn’s history with espionage, and go on to soak in the romance at its Christmas Market.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Belgium, Bruges 2
programme.desc: Market square of Bruges is lined up with restaurants and cafes. The city is also home to golden fries or french fries, but are originated in Belgium.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 City Breaks Bundi, India
programme.desc: From stunning palaces to ornate stepwells, Asmita finds herself soaking in the romance of Bundi, a charming 14th century town in Rajasthan.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Quest Delhi 3, India
programme.desc: From papad ka paratha to lehsun ki kheer, Chef Aditya Jaimini shows Alex Outhwaite how to make some of the unusual dishes from Indian cuisine.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Backpack Split and Salona, Croatia
programme.desc: Explore the beautiful Dalmatian coast with a little history of Split with Alex and stay tuned as next she explores the port city of Salona.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Viajar Peru Titicaca
programme.desc: Amidst the sapphire expanse of Lake Titicaca, Milagros embarks on a journey of reconnecting with her roots. Delving into the secrets of the Uros, she unveils their timeless artistry in building floating islands, a testament to human resilience. But as she travels to Amantani Island, an enigma awaits—a forgotten temple, rituals that date back to the pre-Incan times, chapters of Peru’s lesser-explored history waiting to unfold.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Estonia Narva
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Belgium, Antwerp 1
programme.desc: Renowned as the world's leading city of diamonds, it also holds about possessing the second largest port in whole of Europe.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 City Breaks Bikaner
programme.desc: Bikaner is known to most people as the city of world-famous savoury snacks. When Asmita goes there for a whirlwind trip, however, she discovers that there is a lot more to Rajasthan’s Red City than meets the eye. From the miniature paintings that can be found on the walls of palaces and mansions across the city to the elaborate architecture of the former havelis of merchants, she finds out that Bikaner is an art lover’s paradise.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Quest Amritsar, India
programme.desc: Amritsar,where recipes have been passed down generations. Alex explores it in Quest.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Backpack Zadar, Croatia
programme.desc: Watch a musical instrument powered by sea waves and learn how glassware was made in Roman era. This and more with Alexandra in Zadar episode

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Viajar Peru Cusco
programme.desc: Milagros visits the ancient city of Cusco just in time for the legendary Inti Raymi Festival, a gateway to the Inca empire's beliefs. Hidden in the vibrant festivities, which continue into the night, are glimpses into the lives led by the people during the Inca era.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 10 Days Estonia Setomaa
programme.desc: Marco and Erica soak in the vitality of the student town, Tartu, and experience its eccentricities at the Leaning House and the AHHAA Science Centre. Following this, they visit Obinista, the cultural centre of Setomaa, where the Seto community introduces them to the traditional ways of dressing, singing and dancing. They also indulge in a traditional smoke sauna at nearby Võromaa.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Belgium, Antwerp 2
programme.desc: Antwerp has grown on the banks of the Scheldt River that alongwith the Meuse and the Rhine forms the biggest estuary in western Europe.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 World Spas Gaya Island Resort, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries a massage inspired by the waves of the sea and a chocolate vanilla body wrap at the Gaya Island Resort in Malaysia.

programme.title: Quest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Quest Hoshiyaarpur, India
programme.desc: You won't find anything more comforting than food made from scratch.Join Alex in Hoshiarpur as she finds old cuisines.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Backpack, Plitvice Lopar and Zagreb Croatia
programme.desc: Alexandra in this episode explores Plitvice, where she visits a national park, interacts with locals, tastes local wine and then leaves for Zagreb.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Viajar Peru Inca Valley & Machu Picchu
programme.desc: Scaling rocks and defying heights, Milagros finds herself suspended 1200 feet above the ground at the Sacred Valley of the Incas.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 10 Days Estonia Sooma National Park
programme.desc: Embracing Estonia’s largest area of swamps, meadows and waterside forests, Soomaa National Park is the second largest national park in the country. While trying out bog walking and camping over here, Marco and Erica experience what is known as the “fifth season” in Estonia, the season of floods. They also explore Tallinn’s history with espionage, and go on to soak in the romance at its Christmas Market.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Xplore Belgium Ghent
programme.desc: No matter where you look, you will see impressive, interesting architecture that will catch your eye. Until 1550 Ghent was one of the largest cities.

programme.title: Mystic Sk8 Cup 2025 - Live delayed (Vert/Bowl/Street) Part 2
programme.desc: The Mystic Sk8 Cup 2025 celebrates its 30th anniversary at the legendary Štvanice Island Skatepark. This international skateboarding event welcomes over 180 riders from all over the world to compete in the street, bowl and vert disciplines.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Snow Bike Festival 2017 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival is Europe’s “Winter Festival of Snow Biking”. The third edition of the innovative snow-bike event will take place at Gstaad, Switzerland, from January 19 to 22, 2017.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 GlemmRide 2017 - Mountainbike Slopestyle (AUT)
programme.desc: After the successful premiere in 2015, the date for the 3nd GlemmRide Bike Festival has been fixed: From 6th-9th July 2017 the bike mecca of Saalbach Hinterglemm will host a truly sporty & party filled weekend.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 E-Tour du Mont-Blanc 2021
programme.desc: The route of the MTB multi-stage event Tour du Mont Blanc (E-TMB) leads around Europe's highest mountain - a breathtaking Alpine backdrop. 12,000 meters ascent and 16,000 meters descent over a distance of 300 km.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Snow Bike Festival 2018 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival is Europe’s “Winter Festival of Snow Biking”. The fourth edition of the innovative snow-bike event will take place at Gstaad, Switzerland, from January 18 to 21, 2018.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Go Big or Go Home - Freestyle Kayak
programme.desc: Go big or go home - in search of the perfect waveadidas Outdoorsportsteam: Nick Troutman, Mat Dumoulin, Gerd Serrasolses & Peter CsonkaNo distance is too great for these four athletes - their quest takes them and their kayaks from Africa to North America.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 1
programme.desc: Anniversary base camp / Jungfraujoch (Switzerland)On 3 August 2011, exactly 200 years after the first ascent, the Swiss mountain sports outfitter Mammut will be organizing the biggest summit project in the history of mountaineering on the “Top of Europe”...

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part III (Cerro Kishtwar)
programme.desc: Mammut 150 Peaks Project: Cerro KishtwarKashmir, India, holds some of the world’s most spectacular and mystical mountains. Now with special permissions, an European team will attempt to climb the most aesthetic one of all, Cerro Kishtwar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Free Riding Iran
programme.desc: If one knows in the West above all Iranian moral rigour and war rhetoric, the enduro professionals Anita and Caro Gehrig experience open people, hospitality, great interest in the West and last but not least unconditional passion for mountain biking.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2025 #03: World Rookie Tour Skate & Snow
programme.desc: World Rookie Tour Skate & Snow / Europe: A look back at the skate highlights of the 2023 World Rookie Tour. Then we show the best of the 2024 ski and snowboard action. And finally, we let it rip once again - with the 2024 Skate Finals!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2024 #32: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship #1
programme.desc: Today we´re joining the World Downhill Skateboarding & Luge Championship in Erzincan, Turkey. Nestled in the heart of Eastern Anatolia, Erzincan’s breathtaking landscapes provide a stunning backdrop for this adrenaline-fueled competition.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 GlemmRide Bike Festival - Saalbach-Hinterglemm (AUT)
programme.desc: Saalbach Hinterglemm: The GlemmRide Bike Festival will take place again from July 12th to 15th, 2018. International stars from the world of mountain biking meet at the top-class FMB Gold Slopestyle and show off their best tricks on the unique route

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Snow Bike Festival 2019 - Gstaad (SUI)
programme.desc: The Snow Bike Festival 2019 is THE event of the young snow bike boom and brings together like-minded athletes from all over the world. With the extra wide and grippy wheels you are ready for your exciting ride in the snow.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Attakwas Extreme - MTB - Attakwaskloof (RSA)
programme.desc: Sout Africa´s toughest one-day-mountainbike stage race

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 GlemmRide 2019 - MTB Slopestyle - Saalbach Hinterglemm (AUT)
programme.desc: For the fifth time in a row, Saalbach Hinterglemm is inviting you to a festive bike meeting: the GlemmRide Bike Festival will once again take place in the bike Eldorado. International stars of the mountain bike scene come together and show breathtaking tricks.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup - Sal (CPV)
programme.desc: Sal is the venue for the GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024, where the best wingfoilers in the world will meet for an exciting competition. This paradise in Cape Verde is known for its strong winds and rolling Atlantic waves.

programme.title: Copa Kitely GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 - Ibiraquera (BRA)
programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024, where the world's best wingfoilers will meet. With its constant winds and breathtaking coastline, this Brazilian hotspot provides the perfect backdrop for exciting races.

programme.title: Copa Kitely GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 - Jericoacoara (BRA)
programme.desc: The Copa Kitely GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 will take place in Jericoacoara, where the world's best wingfoilers will compete against each other. With its legendary winds, this Brazilian jewel offers ideal conditions for high-speed racing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering
programme.desc: The Forêt de Fontainebleau in France is the largest and most developed bouldering area in the world and home to one of France's most famous climbers - Mélissa Le Nevé, who was the first woman to climb the technical difficulty level 8B+

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Cape Epic Documentary
programme.desc: The 2018 Cape Epic takes riders through 658km through South Africa's Western Cape countryside and up many hills: the total elevation gain will be 13,530m. The race attracts professional and serious amateur participants from around the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Trans Angeles - MTB - Los Angeles (USA)
programme.desc: It's time for Hans Rey to explore Southern California. What better way to do this than with Tim Commerford, a true rock star and one of mountain biking's brightest legends, Missy Giove?

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Trans Napoli - A Mountain Bike Expedition Naples (ITA)
programme.desc: TransNapoli is an urban MTB adventure led by legendary mountain bike pioneer Hans Rey. It is a colorful five-day tour that crosses the Amalfi and Naples regions of Italy on mountain bikes and e-bikes.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2026 #06: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships
programme.desc: The World Downhill Skateboarding Championships in Tamanique, El Salvador, bring together the world’s fastest downhill skateboarders to compete on one of the most iconic and technical mountain roads in the sport.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 WOF 2026 #07: Transmaurienne Vanoise
programme.desc: The Transmaurienne Vanoise is a renowned multi-day mountain bike event held in the Haute Maurienne Vanoise region in the French Alps. Known for its spectacular alpine scenery and technically demanding trails, the race combines enduro and cross-country elements

programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Freeride World Tour - Best Of Season 2020 - Worldwide
programme.desc: The first stop of this year's Freeride World Tour was in Hakuba, Japan. Next the tour went to Kicking Horse in British Columbia. The third stop took the riders to Ordino Arcalis in the Pyrenees. The last stop was Fieberbrunn in Austria.
